brief: OpenAI faces another high-profile lawsuit; Iran-U.S. tensions escalate with oil tanker strikes in the Gulf; research explores AI in creative writing, email tone, and climate change communication.
news_summary: OpenAI sued again; Iran strikes oil tankers in the Strait of Hormuz, oil prices rise above $85; U.S. inflation cools to 3.5% in June.
papers_summary: Papers examine collaborative creative writing with FIERO, personal narratives on climate change in TikTok videos, and the impact of AI-assisted writing on email recipient engagement.

en.brief: OpenAI faces another high-profile lawsuit; Iran-U.S. tensions escalate with oil tanker strikes in the Gulf; research explores AI in creative writing, email tone, and climate change communication.
en.news_summary: OpenAI sued again; Iran strikes oil tankers in the Strait of Hormuz, oil prices rise above $85; U.S. inflation cools to 3.5% in June.
en.papers_summary: Papers examine collaborative creative writing with FIERO, personal narratives on climate change in TikTok videos, and the impact of AI-assisted writing on email recipient engagement.

zh.brief: 今日中国异见人士董广平驾艇偷渡韩国引发关注，同时南海仲裁案十年争议未平、SpaceX IPO热潮消退。国际方面，中东冲突升级推动油价突破85美元，美伊对峙持续。学术领域暂无中文论文。
zh.news_summary: 董广平第四次偷渡失败后冒险驾艇穿越黄海，凸显中国异见人士困境；南海仲裁案十年未解，直布罗陀边境撤关迎来新纪元。中东局势紧张，伊朗袭击油轮后美国报复，油价上涨。
zh.papers_summary: 今日无中文论文。英文论文涵盖AI辅助写作、加密货币操纵可视化及气候变化叙事等主题。

todays_image.caption: Like the invasive Lobophora sp. seaweed that spreads where it's unwanted, Sam Altman's string of lawsuits is an accumulation he could do without.
todays_image.title: Lobophora sp.
